view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement to broadcast notifications to all waitlisters is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement to broadcast notifications to all waitlisters is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement of broadcasting notifications to all waitlisters as evidenced by the linked use case, which explicitly states that all 10 waitlisters receive simultaneous notifications when a spot opens. The scenario confirms that the system is designed to notify all waitlisters, thus fulfilling the requirement. Additionally, the prior steps indicate that the waitlist functionality is operational, supporting the conclusion that the requirement is covered.
